import React from 'react' import '../styles/tour-details.css' import { Container, Row, Col } from 'reactstrap' import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom' import tourdata from '../assets/data/tours' const TourDetails = () => { const { id } = useParams() // this is an static data letter we will call our api and load our data from database const tour = tourdata.find(tour => String(tour.id) === String(id)) // destructure properties from tour object const { photo, title, desc, price, reviews, city, distance, maxGroupSize } = tour return ( <>

{title}

{desc}
) } export default TourDetails
